# NE1 Digital - LLMs.txt

> NE1 Digital builds professional websites and local SEO strategies for businesses across North Tyneside, Teesside and the wider North East of England.

## About

NE1 Digital is a specialist web design and local SEO agency with offices in North Tyneside and Teesside. We help businesses of all kinds get found on Google and generate more enquiries.

## Services

- [Web Design](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/services/websites-for-trades): Professional websites designed to convert visitors into phone calls and enquiries.
- [Local SEO](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/services/local-seo): Search engine optimisation targeting local customers searching for services in specific areas.
- [Google Business Profile](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/services/google-business-profile): Optimisation of Google Business listings to appear in the local map pack.
- [Service Area Pages](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/services/service-area-pages): Location-specific pages targeting individual towns and areas.
- [SEO](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/services/seo): Comprehensive search engine optimisation built specifically for local businesses.
- [AI & Generative SEO](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/services/ai-seo): Optimisation for AI-powered search tools including ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews.
- [Ongoing SEO Support](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/services/ongoing-seo): Monthly SEO management to maintain and improve search rankings over time.
- [Hosting & Care](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/services/hosting-and-care): Fast hosting, SSL, daily backups, and ongoing website maintenance.

## Industries We Work With

- [Electricians](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/trades/electricians): Domestic and commercial electrical contractors
- [Plumbers](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/trades/plumbers): Plumbing, heating and gas engineers
- [Builders](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/trades/builders): General builders and construction firms
- [Roofers](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/trades/roofers): Roofing contractors and repair specialists
- [Decorators](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/trades/decorators): Painters, decorators and plasterers
- [Joiners & Carpenters](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/trades/joiners): Joiners, carpenters and cabinet makers
- [Landscapers](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/trades/landscapers): Garden design and landscaping services
- [Heating Engineers](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/trades/heating-engineers): Boiler servicing and central heating
- [Plasterers](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/trades/plasterers): Plastering, rendering and skimming
- [Tilers](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/trades/tilers): Floor and wall tiling specialists
- [Scaffolders](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/trades/scaffolders): Scaffolding erection and hire
- [Drainage Engineers](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/trades/drainage-engineers): Drain repairs, CCTV surveys and unblocking
- [Locksmiths](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/trades/locksmiths): Emergency and residential locksmith services
- [Window & Door Fitters](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/trades/window-door-fitters): UPVC, aluminium and composite installations
- [Groundworkers](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/trades/groundworkers): Foundations, drainage and excavation

## Areas We Cover

We serve businesses across the North East of England with a focus on North Tyneside and Teesside, including:

- [Newcastle upon Tyne](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/locations/newcastle)
- [Sunderland](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/locations/sunderland)
- [Gateshead](https://ne1webdesign.co.uk/locations/gateshead)

## Pricing

- **Business Package**: £997 setup + £99/month — includes custom website, SEO structure, hosting, support
- **Pro SEO Package**: £395/month — includes ongoing SEO, content updates, local SEO, competitor analysis
